description_long: This object is a large, symmetrical historical complex set within a landscaped area, featuring a central building with a prominent dome and flanking wings. The structure is approached by a long, straight avenue lined with trees, leading to a circular plaza or roundabout. The main building appears to have a classical architectural style, with a grand entrance and possibly colonnades or porticos. The grounds are meticulously organized, with pathways radiating from the central axis and intersecting at the roundabout. The building is surrounded by open lawns, and the overall layout suggests a formal, ceremonial function. The materials appear to be primarily stone or concrete, with red-tiled roofing and white or light-colored facades.
description: A grand, symmetrical historical building with a dome, flanked by wings, set in landscaped grounds with a tree-lined avenue and circular plaza. The structure features classical elements and is surrounded by open lawns and formal pathways.
description_view_0: From this view, the central avenue and roundabout are prominent, leading directly to the main entrance of the domed building.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the side of the building and the tree-lined approach, showing the symmetry of the grounds and the circular plaza.
description_view_2: Here, the rear of the building is visible, with the avenue and roundabout extending away from the main structure.
description_view_3: This perspective emphasizes the side elevation of the building and the extensive landscaped area, with the roundabout and intersecting pathways clearly visible.
